title: Group Definition Schema V1
description: JSON Schema for a named group entry within the groups block of a domain-physics document. Groups bridge domain roles and system roles to chmod-style group permission bits. The kernel resolves group membership at runtime — it does not need to know the semantic meaning of the group name. Analogous to /etc/group in UNIX.

description.description: Human-readable description of this group's purpose. The kernel ignores this field — it exists for domain authors and auditors.

system_roles.description: System role IDs whose holders are members of this group.

domain_roles.description: Domain-scoped role IDs whose holders are members of this group. Must match role_id values defined in the domain_roles.roles array of the same domain-physics document.

members.description: Membership criteria. At least one of system_roles or domain_roles must be present and non-empty.
